title: Comply.org Core Principles
description: The six core data-protection principles against which vendors are assessed.

const.label: Transparency
const.description: Clear communication about data collection, use, and sharing practices.

const.label: Data Minimization
const.description: Collecting only the data necessary for stated purposes.

const.label: Accountability
const.description: Demonstrable compliance through certifications, audits, and documented processes.

const.label: Security
const.description: Technical and organizational measures protecting data integrity and confidentiality.

const.label: Quality
const.description: Ensuring data accuracy, completeness, and currency.

const.label: Participation
const.description: Supporting data subject rights including access, rectification, and deletion.
